description: CompositionBrown sleeveless round neck top made of 100% cotton, with metal stud detailing and graphic print on the chestFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's understated trend is perfectly captured in this luxe top with its plush fabric. The stud detailing in this piece gives it an interesting dimension. Style this top from s.oliver with jeggings, closed-toe casual shoes, and a structured blazer.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
